options.content:
Chain: dYdX Cosmos Appchain
Type: Cosmos

Cycle: 1h
Fees: 1 bps maker / 5 bps taker
Max Leverage: 20x
Collateral: USDC
Tier 1 (max 35%)
Features: None

Spreads — dYdX v4 as LONG Leg
Positions — SHORT Leg on dYdX v4
Positions — LONG Leg on dYdX v4

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp, symbol, side, order_id, status, filled_qty, avg_price, fees_paid, gas_cost, slippage_bps, tx_hash FROM execution_log WHERE venue = 'dydx' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT hour AS time, symbol, avg_annualized AS value FROM funding_rates_hourly WHERE venue = 'dydx' AND $__timeFilter(hour) ORDER BY hour
SELECT timestamp, symbol, rate, annualized, mark_price, index_price, open_interest, predicted_rate FROM funding_rates WHERE venue = 'dydx' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT timestamp AS time, symbol, composite_score AS value FROM venue_scores WHERE venue = 'dydx' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp, symbol, composite_score, avg_funding_30d, liquidity_depth, fee_score, consistency_score FROM venue_scores WHERE venue = 'dydx' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 30
